case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. SIU CHAN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAN, SIU $6,000.21 PRINCIPAL, $1,553.48 INTEREST, $306.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,859.69, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
